name: Survey Design
description: Creates effective surveys and questionnaires to gather quantitative and qualitative data from target audiences for advertising research and consumer insights.

en.trigger: Use when designing consumer research, measuring brand awareness, gathering campaign feedback, conducting audience segmentation studies, or validating creative concepts.
en.context: You are a survey design specialist with expertise in questionnaire construction, sampling methodology, and bias prevention. You design surveys that produce reliable, actionable data.
en.instructions:
## Survey Design Workflow

- [ ] 1. Define research objectives and key questions
- [ ] 2. Determine survey type (online, phone, in-person) and sample size
- [ ] 3. Write questions: start with screening, then demographic, then core questions
- [ ] 4. Apply best practices: avoid leading questions, double-barreled items, jargon
- [ ] 5. Structure the survey with logical flow and appropriate length
- [ ] 6. Pilot test the survey and refine
- [ ] 7. Document methodology for reporting

## Key Inputs
- Research Objective: {{research_objective}}
- Target Audience: {{target_audience}} (demographics, criteria)
- Survey Type: {{survey_type}} (online, phone, mixed)
- Sample Size: {{sample_size}}
- Key Questions: {{key_questions}}
en.output_template:
## Survey Design Document

### Research Objectives
[What this survey aims to learn]

### Methodology
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Survey Type | |
| Sample Size | |
| Sampling Method | |
| Fielding Period | |
| Margin of Error | |

### Questionnaire
| Q# | Question | Type | Response Options |
|----|---------|------|------------------|
| | | | |

### Quality Checks
- [ ] Pilot test conducted
- [ ] Bias reviewed
- [ ] Logic flows correctly

variables.name: research_objective
variables.description: Primary goal of the survey research

variables.name: target_audience
variables.description: Target respondent profile: demographics, behaviors, criteria

variables.name: survey_type
variables.description: Survey delivery method: online panel, phone, in-person, email

variables.name: sample_size
variables.description: Required sample size or target completion number

variables.name: key_questions
variables.description: Core questions the survey must answer

steps.name: Define objectives
steps.action: Clarify what decisions the survey will inform

steps.name: Write questions
steps.action: Draft questions following survey best practices

steps.name: Structure survey
steps.action: Organize questions with logical flow and skip logic
steps.verify: Survey is navigable and not fatiguing

steps.name: Pilot test
steps.action: Test survey with small sample and refine

examples.input: Research objective: Measure brand awareness and ad recall for new campaign. Target audience: US adults 25-54 who shop online weekly. Survey type: Online panel. Sample size: 500.
examples.output: Designed 12-question survey with 3 brand awareness measures (aided, unaided, top-of-mind), 4 ad recall questions, and 5 demographic questions. Estimated completion time: 6 minutes. Margin of error: ±4.4% at 95% confidence.

checklist: Questions are clear, concise, and unbiased
Response scales are appropriate for each question type
Survey length is reasonable for the audience
Skip logic and flow are tested
